name: @singularity/plugin-debug-live-state-churn-emit
description: Live-state synthetic-push emitter: drives N no-op live-state pushes/sec for a chosen resource via triggerResourcePush on a bounded setInterval, drivable from the Debug → Live-State Emit pane, the /api/debug/live-state-emit/* endpoints, and the window.__liveStateEmit API. A hard auto-stop cap prevents a forgotten session from churning forever.
